---
title: "Dorothea Layton"
---

## Dorothea Layton

**Dates:** (1870-1968)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Second daughter of the Rev. Duke Yonge and Charlotte Pode,  she married  (20 Oct 1898) Frank George Layton.  She was addressed as Dorothy; her children were Monica Yonge Layton (b 1899) and Ronald Layton (b. 1901).

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 10 [1899]
- Letter from [December 1893]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
